---
title: CLAUDE-CODE 中转 使用教程 # 标题
slug:  CLAUDE-CODE-ZHONG-ZHUAN # url(注释掉 和标题相同)
image: https://wcp.cornradio.org/images/claudecode/image.png # 头图，注释掉，否则会有一个难看的呃加载不出来的图片
# description: xxxx # 描述小字(注释掉 不显示描述)

date: 2026-04-08 00:00:00+0000 # 日期时间，如果时间未到，post 不会显示(注释掉 不显示日期)
# weight: 1 # 权重越小，放到越前面   (注释掉 日期排序)

# tags: # 只能在侧面看到的标签,会显示在文章的底部
#     - TAG A
#     - TAG B
# categories: #会显示在 post 上面的分类
#     - themes

---

![Badge](https://hitscounter.dev/api/hit?url=https%3A%2F%2Fb.kill9pid.top%2Fp%2FCLAUDE-CODE-ZHONG-ZHUAN&label=&icon=check-all&color=%23198754)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>使用中转站便宜体验claudecode</title>
  <style>
    
:root {
  --default-font: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif;
  --font-monospace: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
  --background-primary: #ffffff;
  --background-modifier-border: #ddd;
  --text-accent: #705dcf;
  --text-accent-hover: #7a6ae6;
  --text-normal: #2e3338;
  --background-secondary: #f2f3f5;
  --background-secondary-alt: #fcfcfc;
  --text-muted: #888888;
  --font-mermaid: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif;
  --text-error: #E4374B;
  --background-primary-alt: '#fafafa';
  --background-accent: '';
  --interactive-accent: hsl( 254,  80%, calc( 68% + 2.5%));
  --background-modifier-error: #E4374B;
  --background-primary-alt: #fafafa;
  --background-modifier-border: #e0e0e0;
}

    body,input {
  font-family: "Roboto","Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif
}

code, kbd, pre {
  font-family: "Roboto Mono", "Courier New", Courier, monospace;
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

pre {
  padding: 1em 0.5em;
}

table {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #666;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  padding: 0.5em;
}

table thead th,
table tfoot th {
  text-align: left;
  background-color: #eaeaea;
  color: black;
}

table th, table td {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding: 0.5em;
}

table td {
  color: #222222;
}

.callout[data-callout="abstract"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="summary"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="tldr"]  .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="faq"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="info"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="help"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #828ee7;
}
.callout[data-callout="tip"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="hint"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="important"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #34bbe6;
}
.callout[data-callout="success"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="check"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="done"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #a3e048;
}
.callout[data-callout="question"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="todo"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #49da9a;
}
.callout[data-callout="caution"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="attention"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #f7d038;
}
.callout[data-callout="warning"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="missing"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="bug"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #eb7532;
}
.callout[data-callout="failure"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="fail"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="danger"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="error"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #e6261f;
}
.callout[data-callout="example"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #d23be7;
}
.callout[data-callout="quote"] .callout-title,
.callout[data-callout="cite"] .callout-title {
  background-color: #aaaaaa;
}

.callout-icon {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-self: center;
}

svg.svg-icon {
  height: 18px;
  width: 18px;
  stroke-width: 1.75px;
}

.callout {
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 1em 0;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14), 0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 3px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.callout-title {
  padding: .5em;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  font-size: inherit;
  color: black;
  line-height: 1.3em;
}

.callout-title-inner {
  font-weight: bold;
  color: black;
}

.callout-content {
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding: 0.25em .5em;
  color: #222222;
  background-color: white !important;
}

ul.contains-task-list {
  padding-left: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

ul.contains-task-list ul.contains-task-list {
  padding-left: 2em;
}

ul.contains-task-list li input[type="checkbox"] {
  margin-right: .5em;
}

.callout-table,
.callout-table tr,
.callout-table p {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0;
}

.callout-table td {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0 1em;
}

.callout-table p {
  padding-bottom: 0.5em;
}

.source-table {
  width: 100%;
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div><p dir="auto">最近在研究如何在工作电脑上装一个便宜的 vibe coding 工具，工作电脑上禁止使用antigravity、codex，这些能提供免费额度的国外大厂工具，其次网络也是一个问题。 如果使用cursor或者qoder，他们的会员又太贵了。</p>
<p dir="auto">于是我找了个办法，中转站+claudecode。<br>
我是在咸鱼上找到的中转站，它的使用方法跟机场差不多，但是还是比较新的东西所以我写一个简单的教程来介绍一下如何使用。</p>
<blockquote dir="auto">
<p>注意使用中转站有风险,包括但不限于 </p>
<ol>
<li dir="auto">模型很笨</li>
<li dir="auto">偷你的密钥</li>
</ol>
</blockquote>
<h2 data-heading="购买/获取sk" dir="auto">购买/获取sk</h2>
<ol>
<li dir="auto">去   <a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://api.aipaibox.com/" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://api.aipaibox.com/" target="_blank">AI派中转站</a> 注册一个账号</li>
<li dir="auto">进入<a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://api.aipaibox.com/console/topup" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://api.aipaibox.com/console/topup" target="_blank">钱包管理</a>页面，充值额度，新手可以先充个两块钱试试看，如果感觉不好用就当打水漂了也没损失太多。<a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://api.aipaibox.com/register?aff=k2s2" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://api.aipaibox.com/register?aff=k2s2" target="_blank">AFF 链接</a>  </li>
<li dir="auto">进入<a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://api.aipaibox.com/console/token" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://api.aipaibox.com/console/token" target="_blank">令牌管理</a>页面 ，创建令牌，点击编辑，选择 cc 自营（0.8倍率）</li>
<li dir="auto">选择然后点击 【复制所选令牌】</li>
</ol>
<h2 data-heading="下载和安装claudecode（win）" dir="auto">下载和安装claudecode（win）</h2>
<p dir="auto">参考 <a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://canvas.aipaibox.com/traxnode_docs/" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://canvas.aipaibox.com/traxnode_docs/" target="_blank">ai派教程</a>  其中也有mac教程而且更加简单。本文只提供windows示例。</p>
<ol>
<li dir="auto">点击左侧 Claude Code - windows 安装</li>
<li dir="auto">按照教程 安装 git、 node</li>
<li dir="auto">执行命令安装官方claude</li>
</ol>
<pre><code>npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
</code></pre>
<ol start="4">
<li dir="auto">按照教程配置中转站信息和sk</li>
<li dir="auto">安装 <a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch/releases" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch/releases" target="_blank">CC-Switch</a> ，它可以配置中转站信息和添加 sk</li>
<li dir="auto">填写 api 端点和sk<br>
<span alt="Pasted image 20260408215852.png" src="Pasted image 20260408215852.png" class="internal-embed media-embed image-embed is-loaded"><img alt="Pasted image 20260408215852.png" src="data:image/png;base64,"></span><br>
<span alt="Pasted image 20260408215915.png" src="Pasted image 20260408215915.png" class="internal-embed media-embed image-embed is-loaded"><img alt="Pasted image 20260408215915.png" src="data:image/png;base64,"></span></li>
</ol>
<h2 data-heading="使用CC" dir="auto">使用CC</h2>
<ol>
<li dir="auto">使用命令行 powershell ，建议管理员模式打开</li>
<li dir="auto">cd 进入你要编程的文件夹目录</li>
<li dir="auto">执行 claude 命令，在此文件夹打开claude code</li>
<li dir="auto">可选 在cc内执行 <code>/status</code>  可以查看配置是否正确、模型使用<br>
<span alt="Pasted image 20260408220609.png" src="Pasted image 20260408220609.png" class="internal-embed media-embed image-embed is-loaded"><img alt="Pasted image 20260408220609.png" src="data:image/png;base64,"></span><br>
<span alt="Pasted image 20260408220629.png" src="Pasted image 20260408220629.png" class="internal-embed media-embed image-embed is-loaded"><img alt="Pasted image 20260408220629.png" src="data:image/png;base64,"></span></li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">参考：<a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://canvas.aipaibox.com/traxnode_docs/" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://canvas.aipaibox.com/traxnode_docs/" target="_blank">ai派教程</a>  | <a data-tooltip-position="top" aria-label="https://api.aipaibox.com/" rel="noopener nofollow" class="external-link" href="https://api.aipaibox.com/" target="_blank">AI派中转站</a> </p></div>
</body>
</html>
